stories.title: Copy of What did we just watch?! Grades, big questions aft...
stories.summary: The game was absolute chaos, with four straight goals scored by each team before a double OT winner.

stories.title: Knights recover in 2OT, outlast Canes in Game 3
stories.summary: Defenseman Shea Theodore was credited with a goal in double overtime, and the Golden Knights recovered from losing a 4-0 lead to defeat the Carolina Hurricanes 5-4 in Game 3 of the Stanley Cup Final on Saturday, giving Vegas a 2-1 lead in the series.

stories.title: Marner makes Cup history with fastest hat trick
stories.summary: Vegas star Mitch Marner made history with the fastest hat trick by a player in Stanley Cup Final history.

stories.title: Mystics' Johnson ejected, escorted off by police
stories.summary: Mystics coach Sydney Johnson had to be held back while arguing with officials and was escorted off the court by police after being ejected from Saturday's blowout loss to the host Dream.

stories.title: Misiorowski sets SP record with 103.7 mph pitch
stories.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski fired a 103.7 mph pitch during Saturday's game against the Rockies, the fastest by a starter since tracking began in 2008.
